positive: A highly stylized, minimalist portrait of a joyful, ethereal fox spirit, depicted in a dynamic pose amidst swirling constellations and stylized floral elements. The composition should be highly centered and symmetrical, featuring a deep jewel-toned palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with brilliant gold leaf accents and stark white light sources. Focus on clean, elegant lines and silhouettes. The fox's fur texture should be suggested through intricate geometric patterns rather than photorealism, giving it a mystical, stained-glass aesthetic. Integrate abstract elements like flowing silk ribbons and lunar crescents to fill the negative space. Suitable for an all-over apparel print with excellent contrast and visual punch. High detail, fantasy art, Art Nouveau influences, celestial theme.
negative: photorealism, photographic, blur, noise, text, watermark, logo, artifact, cartoonish, dirty, grainy, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, low quality
